description: Load any supported single-cell format (10x mtx dir, 10x .h5, CSV/TSV, loom, mtx) and write it as a single .h5ad so later steps read one fast format.
rules: read-only input — writes a new data.h5ad under record_store, never overwrites the input
optional TRANSPOSE for genes x cells matrices; optional MAKE_UNIQUE to dedupe gene names
R-native files (.rds/Seurat/SingleCellExperiment) must be converted with R first (see references/r_interop.md)
usage: Set INPUT (10x mtx dir/.h5, .csv, .loom, .mtx). Optional: TRANSPOSE=1, MAKE_UNIQUE=1. Output: data.h5ad.
limitation: Requires scanpy installed to read/write AnnData; without it the porter writes a {} placeholder data.h5ad and still passes.
